structural_summary: Executed on stamp paper or e-stamped. Layout: title LEAVE AND LICENSE AGREEMENT; place and date of execution; parties block — Licensor and Licensee with full addresses (a company licensee acts through its authorised signatory); recitals of Licensor's ownership and Licensee's request; numbered operative clauses covering grant and term in months with commencement date, monthly license fee and payment day, interest-free refundable security deposit, permitted use, lock-in, revocation and notice, maintenance and outgoings, no-tenancy/license-only declaration, furniture annexure where furnished, registration and stamp duty, police intimation; Schedule of the Licensed Premises; signature blocks with two witnesses; space for photographs/thumb impressions and registration endorsement per Maharashtra e-registration practice.
statutory_requirements:
- Title the deed "Leave and License Agreement"; style parties as Licensor and Licensee throughout (never Lessor/Lessee).
- Recite a bare licence under Section 52, Indian Easements Act, 1882: no tenancy or interest in the premises; juridical possession remains with the Licensor.
- Describe the premises in a Schedule: full address, area, furnishing status.
- State the monthly license fee, due date, and any escalation for longer terms (customary, not statutory).
- Record the security deposit as interest-free and refundable on expiry or earlier termination, subject to lawful deductions.
- State the term in months (commonly 11-60) with the commencement date; record lock-in (if any) and the written notice period for revocation.
- Registration clause: the agreement must be in writing and registered under Section 55, Maharashtra Rent Control Act, 1999; responsibility rests on the landlord/Licensor; non-registration punishable [VERIFY: penalty quantum].
- State stamp duty is payable under the Maharashtra Stamp Act, 1958 [VERIFY: Article 36A and the 0.25% computation] and allocate stamp/registration costs (commonly the Licensee).
- E-registration through the Maharashtra Department of Registration and Stamps is accepted practice.
- Provide for intimation of licensee particulars to the local police station [VERIFY: Police Commissioner orders / Maharashtra Police Act source].
- Execution by both parties before two witnesses [VERIFY: Registration Act, 1908 interplay for licenses].

fields.name: licensor_name
fields.description: Owner of the premises granting the license

fields.name: licensee_name
fields.description: Individual licensee, or authorised signatory/occupant where the licensee is a company

fields.name: licensee_company
fields.description: Corporate licensee acting through its authorised signatory; only in company scenarios

fields.name: city
fields.description: City/town in Maharashtra where the premises are situated and the deed is executed

fields.name: licensor_address
fields.description: Residential/registered address of the Licensor for the parties block

fields.name: licensee_address
fields.description: Permanent/registered address of the Licensee for the parties block

fields.name: premises_address
fields.description: Licensed premises, reproduced in the Schedule

fields.name: monthly_fee
fields.description: Monthly license fee/compensation; scenario amount_range_inr overrides

fields.name: security_deposit
fields.description: Interest-free refundable deposit, 3-10 months of the monthly fee (kept consistent with monthly_fee, not drawn independently)

fields.name: term_months
fields.description: License term; 11/22/33-month conventions common in Maharashtra

fields.name: start_date
fields.description: Commencement of license, shortly after execution; a genuine forward-looking effective date (future_ok).

fields.name: lock_in_months
fields.description: Period during which neither party may terminate without paying the balance fee

fields.name: notice_months
fields.description: Written notice for early revocation/vacation after lock-in

fields.name: furnishing_status
choices: fully furnished with furniture, fixtures and appliances as per annexure
fields.description: Drives the furniture/fixtures clause and annexure reference

fields.name: police_verification_party
fields.description: Who submits licensee particulars to the local police station
